title: Pressure vessel piping support
summary: Pressure vessel inlet/outlet piping must be supported to avoid external forces on the unit.
evidence_quote: 压力容器进出水接管必须进行支撑，避免外力施加到机组上。

title: Maintenance space requirement
summary: Machine room area must ensure maintenance access for evaporator and condenser.
evidence_quote: 机房面积的大小要能保证蒸发器和冷凝器的维护和保养。

title: Piping connection side option
summary: Default left-side piping connection can be changed to right-side upon request.
evidence_quote: 上图所示为左侧接管进出水,根据要求可改为右侧.

title: Ambient conditions for indoor installation
summary: Unit should be used indoors with ambient temperature above 4°C and relative humidity ≤90%.
evidence_quote: 机组宜在市内使用且周围环境温度在 4℃以上，环境相对湿度≤90%

title: Water system installation requirements
summary: Install shut-off valves at unit inlet/outlet, temperature and pressure gauges, water filter, vibration dampers, and flow control device.
evidence_quote: 机组进出口必须安装截止阀以便于水系统能进行常规的维护。建议在容器进出口处安装温度计和压力表，便于日常的检查和后续的维护；水泵和机组进水处应安装水过滤器，避免杂质进入水泵和容器中；

title: Water system air vent installation
summary: Air vent must be installed at the highest point of the water system.
evidence_quote: 水系统放气阀1必须安装在水系统的最高点。

title: Water flow switch installation
summary: Water flow switch must be installed and interlocked with the unit, placed on a horizontal pipe section at least 1 meter long.
evidence_quote: 水系统必须安装水流量开关13，并与机组连锁，水流开关应安放在至少1米长的水平管段上中央。

title: Initial water system flushing procedure
summary: During initial water circulation, close unit shut-off valves, open bypass valve, run pump, clean filter repeatedly until no impurities.
evidence_quote: 循环水初次运行时，请关闭模块进出水管上的截止阀8，并开启旁通阀7，水泵运行一段时间后，清洗水过滤器6，如此反复多次。确认水系统中没有杂质后方可投入使用,此时开启截止阀8，关闭旁通阀7。

title: Pre-start water system checks
summary: Check all water piping, confirm correct connections and flow direction, open valves, start pumps, flush system, check for leaks, vent air, verify water flow and pressure drop.
evidence_quote: 检查所有的水系统管路，确认蒸发器和冷凝器水路连接无误而且水流方向正确，检查上述换热器进出水管是否连接良好，开启所有的水阀，启动相关水泵。冲洗水管，保证水系统清洁，检查所有的水管及连接处是否有泄漏。排出蒸发器和冷凝器水路中的空气，水路应保持清洁不得有锈渍，检测蒸发器和冷凝器水侧阻力损失并核对水量是否正确，必须保证温度传感器连接正确。

title: Pre-start electrical checks
summary: Check power supply voltage within ±10% of rated, phase imbalance ≤2%, verify capacity, wiring, and interlocks.
evidence_quote: 检查供给机组的电源，其电压波动范围应不超过压缩机铭牌所示额定电压的± 10%，且相电压不平衡不得超过 2%，核实是否有足够的供电容量，以满足机组的启动和满载运行。

title: Pre-start unit checks
summary: Ensure oil heater energized for 24 hours, check oil level, open manual shut-off valves, fully open suction/discharge stop valves then back 1/2 turn, open liquid line stop valve, start pumps.
evidence_quote: 确认压缩机机油加热器已通电 24小时，通过油分离器视液镜观察油面，若观察不到油面则应加油，全开喷液管上的手动截止阀，卸下密封阀帽，完全开启吸、排气截止阀，然后顺时针回 1/2圈，完全开启供液截止阀，启动空调附属设备、冷凝水泵及冷冻水泵，检查所有安全控制装置是否在原始状态，其设定是否正确

title: Normal exhaust pressure range
summary: Exhaust pressure should be 1.1–1.8 MPa.
evidence_quote: 1排气压力 检查高压显示值（排气）  1.1～1.8Mpa

title: Maximum exhaust pressure difference between compressors
summary: Difference in exhaust pressure between operating compressors should be ≤0.1 MPa.

structured_payload.parameter_name: 各运转压缩机间排气压力差

evidence_quote: 2各运转压缩机间排气压力差  检查高压显示值（排气）  ≤0.1Mpa

title: Normal suction pressure range
summary: Suction pressure should be 0.3–0.6 MPa.
evidence_quote: 3吸气压力 检查低压显示值（吸气）  0.3～0.6Mpa

title: Maximum suction pressure difference between compressors
summary: Difference in suction pressure between operating compressors should be ≤0.05 MPa.

structured_payload.parameter_name: 各运转压缩机间吸气压力差

evidence_quote: 4各运转压缩机间吸气压力差  检查低压显示值（吸气）  ≤0.05Mpa

title: Cooling water outlet temperature range
summary: Cooling water outlet temperature should be 30–40°C.
evidence_quote: 6冷却水出口温度  检查温度计  30～40℃

title: Chilled water outlet temperature range
summary: Chilled water outlet temperature should be 5–10°C.
evidence_quote: 7冷冻水出口温度  检查温度计  5～10℃

title: Maximum ambient temperature
summary: Ambient temperature should be ≤40°C.
evidence_quote: 9环境温度（室温）  检查温度计  ≤40℃

title: Long-term shutdown procedure
summary: After compressor pumpdown, close liquid line stop valve, stop pumps, disconnect power, open emergency stop switch, close suction/discharge and liquid line stop valves.
evidence_quote: 压缩机完成制冷剂抽空任务并停机后。关闭供液截止阀。停止水泵运行，断开所有供给机组和水泵的电源，使紧急停机开关处于断开位置，关闭压缩机吸、排气截止阀和供液截止阀前不得启动机组。

title: Cooling temperature setpoint range and default
summary: Cooling temperature setpoint range 6–12°C, default 7°C.
evidence_quote: 其允许的设置范围为： 6~12℃，出厂默认设定值为7℃。

title: Operating temperature differential range and default
summary: Operating temperature differential range 0.5–3°C, default 1.5°C.
evidence_quote: 允许的设置范围一般在 0.5~3℃。出厂默认设定值为 1.5℃。

title: Temperature control PID defaults
summary: P default 35 (range 5–600), I default 2.5 (range 0.5–10), D default 0 (range 0–10).
evidence_quote: P的设置范围为： 5~600，出厂默认设定为 35；I的设置范围为： 0.5~10，出厂默认设定为 2.5；D的设置范围为：0~10，出厂默认设定为 0

title: Superheat setpoint range and default
summary: Superheat setpoint range 15–35°C, default 20°C.
evidence_quote: 过热度的设置范围为：15~35℃，出厂默认设定值为 20℃。

title: Superheat PID defaults
summary: P default 35 (range 5–600), I default 1.8 (range 0.5–10), D default 0 (range 0–10).
evidence_quote: P的设置范围为 5~600，出厂默认设定为 35；I的设置范围 0.5~10，出厂默认设定为 1.8； D的设置范围为 0~10，出厂默认值设定为 0

title: Compressor start/stop logic
summary: Start compressor with shortest runtime when demand >30% of single compressor capacity; start next when demand >110%; start third when >210%. Unload and stop longest runtime compressor when demand <50% per compressor.
evidence_quote: 机组在接到启动指令以后，若冷冻水出水温度≥制冷温度设置 +运行温差设置，并且计算的机组冷量需求大于单台压缩机容量 30%的时候， 机组将首先启动累计运行时间最短压缩机，当机组的冷量需求超过单台压缩机容量的 110%时，将启动累计运行时间次短的压缩机，

title: Refrigerant system moisture check
summary: Check sight glass for moisture and bubbles; if moisture high or bubbles present, replace filter drier core even if charge is sufficient.
evidence_quote: 检查系统各供液管路上指示湿度的玻璃视镜，确认内部充满液体且湿度指示为干燥状态。如果显示湿度较高或视镜内有气泡，即使机组内已充有足够的制冷剂，也应更换干燥过滤器芯 。

title: Condenser and evaporator cleaning
summary: If scaling causes high condensing pressure or poor evaporator heat transfer, use chemical descaler or mechanical cleaning.
evidence_quote: 当空调水进入机组长期运行，容器内的铜管仍然会接垢，从而系统出现过高冷凝压力或蒸发器换热效果不佳的现象，并导致故障停机和机组运行不经济等现象。为此，应在有需要的时候使用化学除垢剂或机械方法来清洗容器水侧。

title: Electrical component maintenance
summary: Electrical components should be serviced by experienced engineers; tighten connections monthly.
evidence_quote: 该机组的电控部件应由有经验的工程师进行维修，在维护电控部件前必须了解电路图，了解冷水机组的运行原理，在维护、检修电气之前一定要使整个电控相近断电，保险断开或保护器跳开表明短路或过载。在更换保险或重新启动压缩机前，必须查明故障并修理，电气组件不须专门维护，只需每月适当拧紧线接头。

title: Recommended maintenance schedule
summary: Replace rotor bearings at 40000h; replace oil at 20000h and 40000h; inspect motor, valves, filters at intervals.
evidence_quote:
转子轴承             ○
电机       △     △    △     △
喷液控制阀           △     △
电磁阀          △     △
吸气过滤器      △    △     △    △
油过滤器     △    △     △ △    ○
喷液管路过滤器      △    △     △    △    ○
冷冻机油         ○     ○
注：○ 更换   △ 检查

title: Unit does not start - no control voltage
summary: Check control transformer fuse.
evidence_quote: b）无控制电压 b）检查控制变压器保险丝

title: Compressor hums but does not start - low voltage
summary: Check main incoming voltage and unit voltage; if low, contact power company or increase wire size. Unit voltage must be 342–418V.
evidence_quote: a）电压低 a）检查主进线电压和机组电压。 如进线电压低，请与电力公司联系；如进线电压正常，增大电源线的线径。组电压必须在 342~418V的范围内。

title: Compressor overload - high running current
summary: Check motor insulation resistance, reset overload relay, run compressor and check current does not exceed 1.25 RLA.
evidence_quote: a）压缩机运行电流过高 a）检查电机绝缘电阻，复位过载保护继电器。在检测电流下运行压缩机。不要超过 1.25RL。

title: Low suction pressure - insufficient evaporator feed
summary: Check expansion valve superheat.
evidence_quote: a）蒸发器供液量不足 a）查看膨胀阀的过热度

title: Low suction pressure - insufficient refrigerant charge
summary: Add refrigerant to system.
evidence_quote: b）制冷剂充注量不足 b）为系统充注制冷剂

title: Low suction pressure - evaporator scaling
summary: If difference between evaporating temperature and leaving water temperature >3°C at full load, clean tubes.
evidence_quote: c）蒸发器水侧结垢严重 c）在 满 载 或 接 近 满 载 时 ，检 查蒸发器蒸发温度。如蒸发温度和出水温度的之差大于 3℃， 则可能是由于污垢引起。此时需要清洁管路。

title: Low suction pressure - insufficient chilled water flow
summary: Measure pressure drop across evaporator to determine flow; if too low, check pump, valves, and strainer.
evidence_quote: d）冷冻水流量不足 d）测试冷冻水通过蒸发器后的压力降，求出水流量。如水流量太小，检查冷冻水泵、阀门和过滤器。

title: Low suction pressure - excess oil in system
summary: If oil level fills sight glass, drain excess oil to 3/4 of sight glass.
evidence_quote: e）系统润滑油太多 e）如果油位一直充满视液镜，要排出多余的润滑油，使油位位于压缩机视液镜的顶部 3/4处即可。

title: High discharge pressure - insufficient condenser water flow
summary: Check condenser pump operation and water strainer for blockage.
evidence_quote: a）流经冷凝器的水量不足 a）检查冷凝器水泵的运行情况。查看水过滤器是否有阻塞，不干净现象

title: High discharge pressure - condenser scaling
summary: If subcooling is 1.1°C higher than when tubes were clean at full load, clean tubes.
evidence_quote: b）冷凝器水侧结垢严重 b）在满载或接近满载时，检查冷凝器过冷度。如过冷度比水路清渣时高出 1.1℃， 则可能是由于污垢引起。清洁管路。

title: Freeze alarm - setpoint too low
summary: Check leaving water temperature setpoint in controller.
evidence_quote: a）水温设置点设置的太低 a）检查微电脑中出水温度的设置

title: Freeze alarm - load fluctuation too large
summary: Reduce load increase rate to a reasonable speed for stable control.
evidence_quote: b）负荷波动太大 b）为了能够自动控制，正常工作，机组负载的增加必须降低到一个合理的速度。
